info.english_meaning: to kill to destroy to hurt to injure to become powerful to take to dwell to stay
info.hindI_arTa: mAra qAlanA balavAna honA grahaRa karanA rahanA vasati karanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: aBihite tvarTe padaM tuYjayet ' (Slo.66) iti devaH  ' aBihitorTaH- BAzaRarUpaH ' iti puruzakAraH  kecidamum ' tuja ' iti paWanti
